top_action_class: Use a non-Ground direct hit or pressure line that pops Air Balloon or makes Magneton choose survival over Spikes/status.
top_three_candidate_classes: direct hit to pop Balloon while preserving the Ground route
deny Spikes or Thunder Wave with immediate pressure
pivot or sack that absorbs Explosion without spending the Electric answer
why_1_over_2: Balloon must be removed before Ground pressure is real; pure denial can still leave Magneton protected and trading later.
mechanics_gates_checked: Air Balloon source and quick oracle checked; Ground into Balloon is 0-0
Air Balloon after-hit runtime smoke clears active and party item after damage
damage_or_fixture_needed: No further Air Balloon damage/item-clear fixture needed; display text/order only matters if UI policy depends on it.

top_action_class: Pressure Gligar without sending the unique Kingdra/Dragonair answer into Toxic or repeated Spikes unless that answer also denies the route.
top_three_candidate_classes: immediate damage or status pressure on Gligar
lower-job absorber for Toxic/Spikes pressure
preserve or reposition the Dragon Dance answer
why_1_over_2: Denying Gligar's first route keeps the Dragon answer clean; passive absorbing risks losing the later setup check.
mechanics_gates_checked: Dragon Dance and Outrage local mechanics
damage_or_fixture_needed: Damage range only needed if the pressure line claims to KO or force Gligar out.

top_action_class: Attack or otherwise force Ariados before setup, unless the setup immediately converts despite Spikes/Toxic/Spider Web.
top_three_candidate_classes: immediate pressure that threatens Ariados
pivot before trap/status lands on an irreplaceable piece
setup only if it beats the Ariados clock
why_1_over_2: Ariados support changes the next three turns; setup that does not convert first becomes fake progress.
damage_or_fixture_needed: Trap timing fixture only needed before hard-coding exact Spider Web branches.

top_action_class: Exploit or respect the revealed Choice Specs Psychic lock while preserving the real Alakazam answer.
top_three_candidate_classes: switch to a public-safe lock punish
stay and make progress if the active survives and converts
preserve the actual long-term Alakazam answer
why_1_over_2: Once Psychic is locked, the switch can gain a whole route; staying is best only if it converts more than the lock punish.
mechanics_gates_checked: damage anchor: 119-141 into Muk with Specs, 79-94 without
no hidden player-team reads for boss AI
damage_or_fixture_needed: Exact range needed for the current target HP before calling stay-in safe.

top_action_class: Scout or absorb the first Choice Band hit with a piece that can punish the revealed lock without spending later Blue answers.
top_three_candidate_classes: absorb or scout the likely locked move
punish the revealed locked move next turn
preserve answers to Gyarados and Arcanine
why_1_over_2: The first turn decides both damage and future lock; raw punish is worse if it spends the later answer before lock is known.
mechanics_gates_checked: contact/recoil if Double-Edge or contact matters
damage_or_fixture_needed: Damage range needed if the scout can be 2HKOed or if Quick Attack revenge range matters.

top_action_class: Make Cloyster choose between survival and first-layer Spikes; do not set a slow hazard route that loses to Explosion or Dewgong Spin.
top_three_candidate_classes: attack or status to make Spikes costly
hazard only if Cloyster cannot layer and cash out profitably
pivot or sack that prices Explosion
why_1_over_2: Denying Cloyster's combined hazard/cash-out route matters more than symmetric hazards that Dewgong can later erase.
damage_or_fixture_needed: Explosion and exact KO ranges need runtime/damage checks before hard policy.

top_action_class: Prefer non-contact progress or control; use contact damage only if Helmet, Poison passive, and RestTalk reset still leave a better board.
top_three_candidate_classes: non-contact damage/status/control
contact attack with recoil/passive/reset priced
preserve the Nidoking or Venomoth answer
why_1_over_2: Avoiding contact preserves route pieces; contact is top only when it forces a decisive threshold before RestTalk resets.
damage_or_fixture_needed: Contact flag and RestTalk runtime checks needed before exact scoring changes.

top_action_class: Deny Dragon Dance immediately if possible; otherwise name the phaze/Haze/status/revenge or commitment-punish line before taking generic damage.
top_three_candidate_classes: immediate denial or strong damage into Gyarados
phaze/Haze/status/revenge after +1
punish Outrage or Hyper Beam commitment
why_1_over_2: Stopping the boost prevents the route; fallback control is second because it may fail after Speed or damage thresholds shift.
damage_or_fixture_needed: Damage and speed check needed before claiming revenge or survival after +1.

top_action_class: Use immediate pressure or an expendable sleep absorber while preserving the route owner from Life Orb damage, Giga Drain recovery, and Explosion.
top_three_candidate_classes: expendable sleep absorber
immediate pressure that denies sleep or cash-out value
preserve or pivot the route owner around Explosion
why_1_over_2: Absorbing sleep is best only if the absorber is low-job; otherwise immediate pressure prevents Exeggutor from choosing the best route branch.
damage_or_fixture_needed: Exact sleep and Explosion behavior need fixtures before hard policy; Life Orb ranges need target-specific checks.

top_action_class: Pressure Forretress before free Spikes/Toxic/Protect scouting while keeping a Starmie-spin and Explosion-safe follow-up in the plan.
top_three_candidate_classes: pressure Forretress immediately
line that punishes or accounts for Starmie Rapid Spin
Explosion-safe route owner or low-job sack
why_1_over_2: Free pressure denial stops all Forretress jobs; planning only for Spin is slower if Forretress already layered or poisoned.
damage_or_fixture_needed: Explosion and Protect timing need fixture caution before exact branch weights.

top_action_class: Name the anti-Curse controller first; damage is top only if it prevents Snorlax from entering a RestTalk cycle that the team cannot break.
top_three_candidate_classes: immediate anti-setup or strong pressure
controller for Rest/Sleep Talk turns
preserve boosted Body Slam answer
why_1_over_2: Anti-setup preserves the whole route; Rest-cycle control is second unless Curse is already contained or damage forces Rest on favorable terms.
damage_or_fixture_needed: Rest/Sleep Talk runtime and Body Slam paralysis/threshold checks needed before exact policy.

top_action_class: Use local matchup-checked pressure or anti-Roar/hazard denial; do not pivot from vanilla Steelix assumptions.
top_three_candidate_classes: local matchup-checked damage into Steel/Dragon Steelix
anti-Roar or hazard-denial line
preserve the Dragon route answer
why_1_over_2: A verified local matchup can force Steelix; anti-Roar is second unless Spikes/Roar immediately invalidates the pressure route.
damage_or_fixture_needed: Damage range needed before claiming KO; phazing timing still needs pending-index caution.
